title: Sunflower from PVZ
description: Change a common sunflower to a silly sunflower from PVZ!
body:
**This silly resousepack change boring vanila sunflower to funny-face Sunflower from Plants vs Zombies!**  
She`s not moving, but maybe in the future we will see that ;)
![Look at this silly face!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd03f5fbab4199586eadf0c0ef7d730692a07c3a.png)


<details>
<summary>Copyright (not) claims</summary>
All rights of "Sunflower" belongs to PopCap Games and Electronic Arts inc. . I, Myllyd_Ogoy, do not claim the rights to this product. The design was created by the above companies and belongs only to them. For my part, I created a Minecraft adaptation of this sunflower.
</details>
